features: IDEAL FOR EVERYDAY CLEANING AROUND THE HOME – Easily tackle everyday stains and accidental spills around the house
HELPS TO COMBAT ODOURS – Doesn’t just mask household odours but actively neutralises them leaving your home refreshed
DESIGNED FOR USE WITH ALL VAX CARPET CLEANERS – Get the best cleaning performance by always using Vax Carpet Cleaning Solutions in your Vax Carpet Cleaner
PERFECT FOR HOMES WITH PETS – Strong on stains and formulated to be used in homes with pets
ROSE BURST SCENT – Leave your carpets smelling fresh and revived with our Rose Burst Fragrance
description: Product Description Vax Original carpet cleaning solution gently lifts out stubborn dirt and stains. It leaves carpets and upholstery clean with a fresh Rose Burst scent for everyday cleaning. Vax Original carpet cleaning solution is Wool safe approved, meaning it's safe to use on delicate carpets. Safety Warning Keep out of reach from children. Contains fragrance. May produce an allergic reaction. In case of contact with eyes, rince cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and continue rinsing
